
========================================
CONVERSATION 1: Capital of France
[id: aaaa000000000001]
========================================

[DAVID]:
What is the capital of France?

[GEMINI]:
The capital of France is Paris.

========================================
CONVERSATION 2: Recursion explained
[id: aaaa000000000002]
========================================

[DAVID]:
Explain recursion briefly.

[GEMINI]:
Recursion is when a function calls itself to solve smaller subproblems.

========================================
CONVERSATION 3: Photosynthesis
[id: aaaa000000000003]
========================================

[DAVID]:
How does photosynthesis work?

[GEMINI]:
Plants convert light, water and carbon dioxide into glucose and oxygen.
